terminal_capability_t(3) Library Functions Manual terminal_capability_t(3)

NAME

terminal_capability_t - Supported terminal capability (for offer/answer).

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/webrtc/sdp.h>

Data Fields


acip_codec_t codec
Rendering capability type. terminal_format_params_t format
Format parameters.

Detailed Description

Supported terminal capability (for offer/answer).

Definition at line 100 of file sdp.h.

Field Documentation

acip_codec_t terminal_capability_t::codec

Rendering capability type.

Definition at line 101 of file sdp.h.

Referenced by sdp_detect_terminal_capabilities(), sdp_generate_answer(), sdp_get_selected_video_codec(), and sdp_parse().

terminal_format_params_t terminal_capability_t::format

Format parameters.

Definition at line 102 of file sdp.h.
